#  Open a Drawing 
##  Things to Consider​ 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawing** tool.
  2. Click **Open** in the drawing log next to the drawing you want to open.
  3. Perform any of the supported actions:
     * [Add a Link to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-a-link-to-a-drawing)
     * [Filter Drawing Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/filter-drawing-markups)
     * [Link Related Items on a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/link-items-on-a-drawing)
     * [Use the Drawings Markup Toolbar](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing)
     * [View Markup Activity Feed](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-the-markup-activity-feed)


## See Also
  * [View Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-drawings)
  * [Delete Pending or Unpublished Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-pending-or-unpublished-drawings)
  * [Upload Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/upload-drawings)
title: Open a Drawing
